focusPoints.label: Late arrivals — workload or personal rhythm?
focusPoints.reason: Notes mention they are always late to work. Could be workload-related, personal scheduling, or something else — worth exploring the underlying reason.

focusPoints.reason: Notes about being late might signal energy or motivation issues. Could be fatigue, disengagement, or just a preference for later starts — worth clarifying.

focusPoints.label: Current design projects and priorities
focusPoints.reason: No specific signal — standard bi-weekly topic. Useful to align on what they're focusing on and any shifting priorities.

focusPoints.reason: No specific signal — routine check-in territory. Identifying blockers can help understand if late starts are related to waiting on others.

focusPoints.reason: No specific signal — standard check-in hygiene. Opens the door for them to express any support they need from you.
